glosses.ro: a considera; a lua în seamă

sentences.target: Je considère cette option trop chère.

translations.fr: Je considère cette option trop chère.
translations.en: I consider this option too expensive.
translations.de: Ich finde diese Option zu teuer.
translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得这个选项太贵了。
translations.ru: Я считаю этот вариант слишком дорогим.
translations.he: אני חושב שאפשרות זו יקרה מדי.
translations.vi: Tôi cho rằng lựa chọn này quá đắt.
translations.nl: Ik vind deze optie te duur.
translations.uk: Я вважаю цей варіант надто дорогим.
translations.hu: Túl drágának tartom ezt az opciót.
translations.hi: मैं इस विकल्प को बहुत महंगा मानता हूँ.
translations.pl: Uważam tę opcję za zbyt drogą.
translations.el: Θεωρώ αυτήν την επιλογή υπερβολικά ακριβή.
translations.nb: Jeg synes dette alternativet er for dyrt.
translations.id: Saya menganggap opsi ini terlalu mahal.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att det här alternativet är för dyrt.
translations.cs: Považuji tuto možnost za příliš drahou.
translations.da: Jeg synes, at denne mulighed er for dyr.
translations.fi: Minusta tämä vaihtoehto on liian kallis.
translations.ja: この選択肢は高すぎると思います。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and an object complement.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'option'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'considère'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'chère'.
Adjective, feminine singular; object complement (predicative) describing 'option'.

sentences.target: Tu considères ce film trop long.

translations.fr: Tu considères ce film trop long.
translations.en: You consider this movie too long.
translations.de: Du findest diesen Film zu lang.
translations.zh-Hans: 你觉得这部电影太长了。
translations.ru: Ты считаешь этот фильм слишком длинным.
translations.pt: Você acha este filme longo demais.
translations.he: אתה חושב שהסרט הזה ארוך מדי.
translations.vi: Bạn cho rằng bộ phim này quá dài.
translations.ar: أنت تعتبر هذا الفيلم طويلًا جدًا.
translations.nl: Je vindt deze film te lang.
translations.uk: Ти вважаєш цей фільм надто довгим.
translations.hu: Túl hosszúnak tartod ezt a filmet.
translations.hi: तुम्हें यह फ़िल्म बहुत लंबी लगती है.
translations.pl: Uważasz ten film za zbyt długi.
translations.el: Θεωρείς αυτήν την ταινία υπερβολικά μεγάλη σε διάρκεια.
translations.nb: Du synes denne filmen er for lang.
translations.id: Kamu menganggap film ini terlalu lama.
translations.sv: Du tycker att den här filmen är för lång.
translations.cs: Považuješ tento film za příliš dlouhý.
translations.da: Du synes, at denne film er for lang.
translations.fi: Sinusta tämä elokuva on liian pitkä.
translations.ja: あなたはこの映画が長すぎると思っています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object and an object complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'considères'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'long'.
Adjective, masculine singular; object complement (predicative) describing 'film'.

translations.de: Wir halten diesen Kunden für wichtig.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们认为这个客户很重要。
translations.yue: 我哋覺得呢個客好重要。
translations.he: אנחנו רואים בלקוח הזה לקוח חשוב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi xem khách hàng này là quan trọng.
translations.hi: हम इस ग्राहक को महत्वपूर्ण मानते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi anser denne kunden som viktig.
translations.sv: Vi tycker att den här kunden är viktig.
translations.da: Vi anser denne kunde for vigtig.
translations.ja: 私たちはこの顧客を重要だと考えます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural subject pronoun.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes 'ce client' as direct object and 'important' as object complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'client'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'considérons'.
Adjective, masculine singular; object complement (predicative) describing 'client'.

sentences.target: On va considérer une autre solution.

translations.fr: On va considérer une autre solution.
translations.en: We're going to consider another solution.
translations.de: Wir werden eine andere Lösung in Betracht ziehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们会考虑另一个解决方案。
translations.yue: 我哋會考慮另一個解決方案。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét một giải pháp khác.
translations.nl: We gaan een andere oplossing overwegen.
translations.hi: हम एक और समाधान पर विचार करेंगे.
translations.nb: Vi skal vurdere en annen løsning.
translations.sv: Vi ska överväga en annan lösning.
translations.ro: Vom lua în considerare o altă soluție.
translations.da: Vi vil overveje en anden løsning.
translations.ja: 別の解決策を検討します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun ('one'/'we').
Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative, 3rd person singular, forming periphrastic future with an infinitive.
Main verb in the infinitive; complement of the auxiliary 'va'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'solution'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'solution'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'considérer'.
